_publications._publicationTitle: Ex vivo to in vivo model of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for precision oncology

_contextSnippet: Drug response ex vivo predicted drug response in vivo
details: WU-225 MPNST cells assembled into 3D microtissues with good viability (>50% at 48 h); ex vivo drug response tested for trabectedin, olaparib, and mirdametinib; ex vivo responses predicted in vivo PDX responses
